title: 有馬記念の後に・顔を上げれば

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite not taking the win, Nice Nature is able to
look back on the Arima Kinen as a fun experience
where she strived with all her might to live up to
her fans' expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then tries to ask Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro
Ryan for the secret to becoming even stronger
than she is now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two, pleased by the question, promise to
answer this question properly at a later date.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Showing signs of new growth, Nice Nature aims
for her next goal—the Takarazuka Kinen.
